title: Zapier and monday.com
excerpt: Anyone know how to set up a Zap with Monday.com and Mailchimp so that if a certain column in Monday changes it sends a campaign in Mailchimp?

posts.author: MVPNIL (Jenn Gray)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone know how to set up a Zap with Monday.com and Mailchimp so that if a certain column in Monday changes it sends a campaign in Mailchimp?

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MVPNIL,

Not exactly what you were asking for but we’ve built a robust integration with Mailchimp -
Mailchimp Integration Plus that provides a robust solution for connecting Mailchimp & monday.com and could be an alternative solution to using Zapier.

Screenshot 2024-05-13 at 13.29.102104×364 34.5 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
@MVPNIL

Welcome to the monday

Integrate Mailchimp with monday.com and instantly update your mailing lists and seamlessly get statistics about campaign performance right inside your boards! Manage your campaigns from one place, sync leads and subscribers, get notifications and stats on sent campaigns.

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can build this exact automation using zzBots. When a certain column(s) changes in Monday.com , send a campaign in Mailchimp.

If you are interested in getting this set up, just chat with us on our website.
